text.title: stakeholder-engagement Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for stakeholder-engagement as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating all Manage Closely stakeholders with the same tone and cadence.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A CFO and a regulator demand opposite communication styles even though both fall in the same quadrant — context-specific strategy is required.

failure-mode.description: Agent invents stakeholder names not found in org-chart or charter inputs.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs hallucinate plausible-sounding personas; always seed with real org-chart export and reject any name not in the source list unless flagged suggested_to_verify.

failure-mode.description: Agent sends engagement communications directly to executives without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Auto-send is forbidden to executives, regulators, customers, board. Agent drafts; sponsor or PM approves and sends.

failure-mode.description: Bulk reclassification of stakeholder quadrants in a single agent run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cap agent edits to 5 stakeholders per run and require human review on the diff — bulk changes destroy the evidence trail and can reverse carefully built relationships.
